name: CHAMPIONS ONCOLOGY, INC.
business: We are a technology-enabled research organization engaged in creating technology solutions to be utilized in drug discovery and development. Our research services utilize our research center to assist pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies with their drug development process. We also offer access to certain PDX model data via licensing agreements and a SaaS platform called Lumin Bioinformatics.

exposures.sentence: Lumin leverages Champions large Datacenter coupled with analytics and artificial intelligence to provide a robust tool for computational cancer research.

tamClaims.claim: The global oncology drug market is estimated to be as high as $223 billion in 2024 with continued projected growth.
